data.title: How to parse all the content of an image using gpt-4 model, since the maxm context length is only 4095 tokens
data.text: You will likely want to use some image slicing with overlap, and send requests that don't require such a large output. You can try either sending multiple image inputs attached to a user message, or simply separate requests. The input context length of vision AI models is large - just the output ...

data.title: Can't create a comprehensive list
data.text: AI models that are available in the plus plan will have a tendency to limit the output to about 800 tokens before they simply find a way to cut off the output.
